message:
fix(graph_scoring): replace panicking index with safe .get() lookups

betweenness_centrality() used direct HashMap indexing (map[&key]) which
panics on missing keys. Switch to .get().unwrap_or() with sensible
defaults (0 for distances, 0.0 for sigma/delta, 1.0 for sigma divisor
to avoid division by zero). Also use .entry().or_insert() for
accumulation to handle missing entries gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
